description_long: This is an outdoor stage structure set on a large, rectangular dirt platform, with a backdrop wall featuring a building facade. The stage area is slightly elevated and bordered by metal truss frames, likely for lighting or sound equipment. The ground in front of the stage is bare earth, showing footprints and scattered debris, suggesting frequent use or recent activity. The backdrop wall is painted white and displays architectural details reminiscent of a classical or institutional building. On the stage, there are several blue-covered objects, possibly equipment or props, and a central black structure that may serve as a podium or main performance area. The overall setup is utilitarian, designed for public performances or events in an urban park or open space.
description: A large outdoor stage with a dirt platform, metal truss frames, and a white building facade backdrop, set up for public events.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long dirt platform, truss frames, and the stage area with the backdrop wall on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the white building facade backdrop and the expanse of the dirt platform.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the truss frames and stage area on the left.
description_view_3: Front view showing the stage area, blue-covered objects, central black structure, and the building facade backdrop.
